---
title: "Rscience - Anova - script01 - Anova - Import and control"
format: 
  html:
    css: custom_theme.css
    grid:
      body-width: 2000px
      margin-width: 250px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem
    toc: true
    toc-float: true
    toc-location: right
    self-contained: true
    link-citations: true # Util para ver referencias en el margen (ver `tufte.html` en la galería de Quarto)

knitr: 
    opts_chunk: 
        collapse: false
        comment: ""

    
---

```{r eval=TRUE, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
source(file = "fn_generate_r_scripts.R")
``` 


```{r eval=TRUE, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
fn_generate_r_scripts()
```
